overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along the Del Perro Beach promenade at sunset. The camera follows the character as they stroll past beachfront houses, palm trees, and benches, with the ocean visible to the right. The scene transitions from walking along the residential buildings to facing the sunset over the water.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beachfront promenade past benches and palm trees

notable_agents.action: man in pink shirt walking in the opposite direction along the path

entered.detail: two-story beige stucco building with wooden window frames and balcony
tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade
concrete park benches facing the beach
ornate black street lamps along the beachside path
wide sandy beach area between the path and ocean
distant amusement park pier with ferris wheel visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a beachfront promenade at sunset, with the camera walking past residential buildings on the left and the beach on the right. Palm trees line the path, and concrete benches face the ocean. A pedestrian in a pink shirt walks toward the camera as it moves steadily forward along the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade passing hillside parking area

events.description: parking lot with parked cars comes into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade past the parking area and foreclosure sign

notable_agents.action: person standing near trash bin looking out at the beach

entered.detail: small parking area with several parked cars adjacent to the promenade
red sports car parked in the lot
bright yellow and green for sale sign with foreclosure text
large tan mediterranean-style house with multiple balconies above the parking area

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the promenade as a parking lot with several cars comes into view on the left, situated below a large mediterranean villa. A bright green foreclosure sign is posted near the path. The beach remains visible to the right, with the distant pier still on the horizon. The pedestrian density remains light with occasional people visible near the benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach facing sunset over ocean

events.description: camera turns sharply to the right to face the ocean and setting sun

agents.ego_description: turning to face the beach and sunset, pausing to observe the ocean view

notable_agents.action: man in yellow shirt walking past from right to left across the frame

entered.detail: small lifeguard tower silhouetted against the sunset on the beach
bright orange and pink sunset over the ocean water
calm ocean extending to the horizon with sunset reflection

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera turns right to face the open beach and ocean, transitioning from the built promenade to the natural shoreline. The sunset dominates the view with vibrant pink and orange hues reflecting off the water. A lifeguard tower stands silhouetted in the distance on the sand, and a pedestrian in a yellow shirt walks past as the camera settles on the ocean view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a beachfront promenade that gradually shifts from a residential walkway to a wide view of the ocean at sunset. It begins by moving steadily forward past residential buildings and palm trees, passing a pedestrian in a pink shirt while concrete benches line the path toward the beach. As the camera continues, the scene opens up to reveal a parking lot and a large Mediterranean villa featuring a bright green foreclosure sign on the left. The movement then transitions as the camera turns right, leaving the built environment of the promenade to face the natural shoreline. Finally, the view settles on the open ocean under a vibrant pink and orange sunset, with a silhouetted lifeguard tower in the distance and a pedestrian in a yellow shirt walking across the sand.
